Title: Make Directory
Description: Create a directory and all intermediate parents

Title: Remove Directory
Description: Recursively delete a directory and all its contents

Title: List Files (detailed)
Description: List all files with human-readable sizes

Title: Copy File
Description: Copy a file or directory to a new location

Title: Move / Rename
Description: Move or rename a file or directory

Title: Delete File
Description: Remove a single file permanently

Title: Create Empty File
Description: Create an empty file or update its modification time

Title: Find Files by Name
Description: Search the entire filesystem for files matching a pattern

Title: Show File Contents
Description: Print the full contents of a file to stdout

Title: Tail Log File
Description: Stream new lines as they are appended to a log file

Title: Disk Usage of Directory
Description: Show total disk usage of a directory in human-readable form

Title: Set File Permissions
Description: Change read/write/execute permissions on a file

Title: Change Owner
Description: Change the owning user and group of a file

Title: Create Symlink
Description: Create a symbolic link pointing to a target path

Title: Archive with tar
Description: Compress a folder into a gzipped tarball archive

Title: Extract tar.gz
Description: Extract a gzipped tarball to the current directory

Title: Ping Host
Description: Send 4 ICMP echo requests to test connectivity

Title: Show IP Addresses
Description: Display IP addresses for all network interfaces

Title: My IP Address
Description: Print the current machine IP address (system variable)

Title: Test Port
Description: Check if a specific TCP port is open on a remote host

Title: Download File (wget)
Description: Download a file from a URL using wget

Title: Download File (curl)
Description: Download a file from a URL using curl

Title: Show Open Ports
Description: List all listening TCP ports with associated process names

Title: Trace Route
Description: Print network hops between this machine and a destination

Title: DNS Lookup
Description: Query DNS records for a domain name

Title: SSH to Host
Description: Open an SSH session using the current username

Title: SCP Copy to Remote
Description: Securely copy a local file to a remote server

Title: Firewall Status
Description: Show current UFW firewall rules and their status

Title: System Update (apt)
Command: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
Description: Refresh package list and upgrade all installed packages

Title: Reboot
Description: Restart the system immediately

Title: Shutdown
Description: Power off the machine without delay

Title: Memory Usage
Description: Display RAM and swap usage in human-readable form

Title: CPU & Load Snapshot
Description: Print a one-shot snapshot of CPU usage and load

Title: Disk Space
Description: Show free and used disk space for all mounted filesystems

Title: System Info
Description: Print kernel name, version, and architecture

Title: Running Services
Description: List all currently active and running systemd services

Title: Journal Logs
Description: Show recent systemd journal entries with context lines

Title: Failed Services
Description: List all systemd units that have entered a failed state

Title: Restart Service
Description: Restart a named systemd service immediately

Title: Enable Service on Boot
Description: Mark a service to start automatically on boot

Title: Who Is Logged In
Description: Show a list of currently logged-in users

Title: Last Logins
Description: Display the 20 most recent login records

Title: Environment Variables
Description: Print all environment variables sorted alphabetically

Title: Install Package (apt)
Description: Install one or more packages via apt non-interactively

Title: Remove Package
Description: Remove a package and its configuration files

Title: Search Package
Description: Search available apt packages by keyword

Title: List Installed Packages
Description: List installed packages matching a search pattern

Title: Autoremove Unused
Description: Remove packages that are no longer needed as dependencies

Title: List All Processes
Description: Show all running processes with CPU and memory usage

Title: Kill Process by Name
Description: Send SIGTERM to all processes matching the given name

Title: Kill by PID
Description: Forcefully terminate a process by its process ID

Title: Find Process by Name
Description: Find PIDs and command lines matching a process name

Title: Interactive Process Viewer
Description: Launch interactive process viewer (requires htop installed)
